'''pathubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbatarianism|sabbatarianism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbatarianism|sabbatarianism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pathubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæthibith|pæthibith]] || [[word:pæthibij|pæthibij]] || [[word:pæthibish|pæthibish]] || [[word:pæthibi|pæthibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathuthubuth|pathuthubuth]] || [[word:pathuthubuj|pathuthubuj]] || [[word:pathuthubush|pathuthubush]] || [[word:pathuthubu|pathuthubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathubuth|pathubuth]] || [[word:pathubuj|pathubuj]] || [[word:pathubush|pathubush]] || [[word:pathubu|pathubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathufbuth|pathufbuth]] || [[word:pathufbuj|pathufbuj]] || [[word:pathufbush|pathufbush]] || [[word:pathufbuf|pathufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pathubuthu|pathubuthu]] || [[word:pathubuju|pathubuju]] || [[word:pathubushu|pathubushu]] || [[word:pathubuku|pathubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pathubuth|pathubuth]] || [[word:pathubuj|pathubuj]] || [[word:pathubush|pathubush]] || [[word:pathubu|pathubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pathubuthul|pathubuthul]] || [[word:pathubujul|pathubujul]] || [[word:pathubushul|pathubushul]] || [[word:pathubukul|pathubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pathubuthuthu|pathubuthuthu]] || [[word:pathubujuju|pathubujuju]] || [[word:pathubushushu|pathubushushu]] || [[word:pathubuku|pathubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pathubuthun|pathubuthun]] || [[word:pathubujun|pathubujun]] || [[word:pathubushun|pathubushun]] || [[word:pathubukun|pathubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pathubuthuoro|pathubuthuoro]] || [[word:pathubujuoro|pathubujuoro]] || [[word:pathubushuoro|pathubushuoro]] || [[word:pathubukuoro|pathubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
